meaning: adj.详尽论述的,理由充分的
examples: I reasoned that changing my diet would lower my cholesterol level.
"Without doubt, that was it," he reasoned.
Silent genes accumulate random mutations, they reasoned, eventually rendering them useless.
If his stock selection was good, Jones reasoned, he would be more than fully invested.
Yet one badly reasoned opinion by one overreaching judge can undo it all, just like that.
